description:
This intelligent full-body massage mat features 10pcs interchangeable heads for comprehensive coverage across various body areas. Offering 9 modes, vibration intensities, speeds, and 3 levels of heat for customized relaxation, this massage mat effectively reduce stress, tension, and fatigue after long day work. Additionally, it includes targeted heating focused on the lumbar area, to optimize blood circulation, body metabolism, and overall well-being. Detachable pillow comes with two massaging heads that mimic human finger pressure, to alleviate neck pain, stiffness, and sore muscles while built-in warming light enhances blood circulation around the neck. Crafted from soft polyester plush surface and sponge filling, this mat provides luxurious comfort, enabling rejuvenation anywhere you want. Perfect gift for your beloved one in special occasions.

Feature：

  • Full Body Massage Mat: Featured with 10Pcs massage heads that cover back, buttock, waist, thigh, calf, this intelligent massage mat allows you to fully immerse yourself in 9 modes, 9 vibration intensities, 9 speeds and 3 heating multiple massage, effectively help reduce stress, tension and eliminate fatigue after a long work day. Additionally, targeted massage modes also offer a personalized massage experience, ensuring every part of your body receives the attention it deserves.

 

  • Soothing Heat Therapy: In addition to its massage functions, this full body massage mat also integrates a targeted heating function specifically focused on the lumbar zones. During smoothing heating therapy, the massage mat optimizes blood circulation and expedite body metabolism, contributing to an enhanced sense of health and vitality. You can choose 3-level heating to suit your personal needs. (The heat can be turned on without massage, the neck heating and body heating are working separately.)

 

  • Detachable Massage Pillow: Come with a detachable massage pillow, 2 massaging head can grasp, knead, press your sore muscles like human fingers, helping relieve your neck pain and stiff neck muscle. You can choose positive or negative direction of massaging or choose other 3 massaging modes as you like. 3 Speeds meet your diverse demands. Built-in heating light brings warmth to your muscle and results in speeding up blood circulation on your neck.

 

  • Enhanced Soft Plush Fabric: Crafted from soft polyester plush surface and soft sponge filling, this full body massage mat provides a luxurious and comfortable experience for anyone looking to relax and unwind. You can enjoy a rejuvenating massage session while sitting in your favorite chair, recliner, bed, couch, or even on a wood floor without any discomfort. Extra inflatable pillow is included to enhance neck support.

 

  • Perfect Gift For Beloved One: 15Mins auto-off timer is designed to care for your safety and health, prevent injury due to overuse. The massaging mat is ideal for use at home or in the office, making it a perfect gift for your grandparents, parents, spouse, or friends on Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, or their birthday.

Specification：

Product Type: Full Body Massage Mat
Material: Plush Surface, Sponge Fillings
Color: Grey
Voltage: 100-240V 50-60Hz
Operation Method: Key Control
Massage Pad Function:
Applicable Massage Body Part: Waist, Buttock, Leg, Full Body
Massage Point Quantity: 10Pcs
Massage Mode: 9Modes
Heating Level: 3Levels
Vibration Intensity Level: 9Levels
Speed Level: 9Levels
Timer: 15Mins Auto Off
Heating Area: Waist Part
Massage Pillow Function:
Speed Level: 3Levels
Heating Level: 1Level
Massage Mode: Intelligent Mode(Manipulation/Reverse/Scraping Mode); Energy-Saving Mode(Minimum Speed)
Storage Bag Size: 62*42*20cm/24.41*16.53*7.87in
Inflatable Pillow Size: 44*22cm/17.32*8.66in
Massage Pillow Size: 50*25cm/19.68*9.84in
Remote Cable Length: 55cm/21.65in
Adapter Cord Length: 135cm/53.14in
Massage Mat Size: 135*50cm/53.14*19.68in
Total of Item Weight: 2.3kg/5.07lbs
Package Size: 51*21*32cm/20.08*8.27*12.6in
Package Weight: 2.95KG/6.5lbs

Package Contents：

1x Full Body Massage Mat
1x Inflatable Pillow
1x Adapter
1x Storage Bag
1x User Manual

 

    Friendly Reminder: This is only a gentle vibration massage, not a deep kneading shiatsu massage. If you are looking for a deep shiatsu massage, please do not purchase this product.
